# shellcheck-baseline.txt — pre-existing ShellCheck violations snapshot.
#
# This file was generated on 2026-04-20.
# ShellCheck was NOT installed on the developer's macOS machine at capture time.
#
# HOW TO REGENERATE (after installing shellcheck):
#   brew install shellcheck          # macOS
#   scripts/lint-shell.sh --baseline  # captures current violations here
#
# HOW TO USE IN CI:
#   scripts/lint-shell.sh --new-only  # fails only if NEW violations appear
#
# VIOLATION COUNT AT CAPTURE TIME: unknown (shellcheck not available locally)
# Run inside Dockerfile.ci-linux to get the real count:
#   docker build -f Dockerfile.ci-linux -t luum-ci .
#   docker run --rm luum-ci scripts/lint-shell.sh --baseline
#   docker run --rm luum-ci cat scripts/shellcheck-baseline.txt
#
# Suppressed codes (never appear in baseline):
#   SC1091 — not following source
#   SC2086 — double-quote to prevent word splitting
